positive: A mystical geometric forest scene, featuring stylized silhouettes of interlocking trees, celestial moons, and crystalline fauna. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, with strong negative space. Use a deep indigo and vibrant gold color palette, illuminated by bioluminescent ethereal light emanating from the ground and hidden geometric sources. The style should blend Art Nouveau flow with minimalist sacred geometry, ensuring clean lines, bold outlines, and high contrast suitable for screen printing on apparel. Intricate details, maximal symmetry, perfect composition.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noisy, low detail, grain, poorly rendered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, photorealistic, logo, trademark, copyrighted, character, lettering, people
